sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63192" key="liqokrh/demnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῐθο-κρήδεμνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n63192.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with crown of stone</tr_>, of a cliff, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4081.tlg001.perseus-grc1:103" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Coluth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">103</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
